/usr/bin/ccache /usr/bin/ar qc ../libembree_sse42.a CMakeFiles/embree_sse42.dir/__/__/geometry/instance_intersector.cpp.sse42.cpp.o CMakeFiles/embree_sse42.dir/__/__/geometry/instance_array_intersector.cpp.sse42.cpp.o CMakeFiles/embree_sse42.dir/__/__/geometry/curve_intersector_virtual_4v.cpp.sse42.cpp.o CMakeFiles/embree_sse42.dir/__/__/geometry/curve_intersector_virtual_4i.cpp.sse42.cpp.o CMakeFiles/embree_sse42.dir/__/__/geometry/curve_intersector_virtual_4i_mb.cpp.sse42.cpp.o CMakeFiles/embree_sse42.dir/__/__/geometry/curve_intersector_virtual_8v.cpp.sse42.cpp.o CMakeFiles/embree_sse42.dir/__/__/geometry/curve_intersector_virtual_8i.cpp.sse42.cpp.o CMakeFiles/embree_sse42.dir/__/__/geometry/curve_intersector_virtual_8i_mb.cpp.sse42.cpp.o CMakeFiles/embree_sse42.dir/__/__/bvh/bvh_intersector1_bvh4.cpp.sse42.cpp.o CMakeFiles/embree_sse42.dir/__/__/bvh/bvh_intersector_hybrid4_bvh4.cpp.sse42.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ccache /usr/bin/ranlib ../libembree_sse42.a
